scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/css dist/js dist/img && cp index.html dist/ && cp v2.html dist/ && cp v4.html dist/ && cp thank-you.html dist/ && cp favicon.svg dist/ && cp -r img/. dist/img/ 2>/dev/null; npx lightningcss --minify css/styles.css -o dist/css/styles.css && npx terser js/main.js -o dist/js/main.js --compress --mangle && npx terser js/thank-you.js -o dist/js/thank-you.js --compress --mangle
